DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER IAN PRIOR, ELSIE PRIOR AMENDED NOTICE OF PETITION TO COMPEL RESPONDENT X CORP. TO COMPLY WITH DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS FOR BUSINESS RECORDS IS GRANTED. PETITIONERS HAVE SATISFIED THE KRINSKY FACTORS FOR UNMASKING ANONYMOUS SPEAKERS. RESPONDENT X CORP. SHALL PROMPTLY COMPLY WITH THE CALIFORNIA SUBPOENAS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM TOM COHEN AT TOM@THOMASCOHEN.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOMAS COHEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Petition To Compel Respondent X Corp. To Comply With Deposition Subpoenas For Business Records
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER IAN PRIOR, ELSIE PRIOR Amended Notice Of Petition To Compel Respondent X Corp. To Comply With Deposition Subpoenas For Business Records

The Petition is granted. Petitioners have satisfied the Krinsky factors for unmasking anonymous speakers. Respondent X Corp. shall promptly comply with the California subpoenas.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem Tom Cohen at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tomas Cohen; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
